channel.title: Home on Wrocław AI Symposium 2026
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Wrocław AI Symposium 2026

item.title: Interpretable Graph Models for Urban Mobility
item.description: We use graph neural networks with attention maps to forecast transit bottlenecks while preserving interpretability for city planners.

item.title: Efficient Fine-Tuning for Under-Resourced Domains
item.description: A comparative analysis of LoRA variants across legal and public-sector corpora with strict memory and latency constraints.

item.title: Human-in-the-Loop Safety for LLM Agents
item.description: This work studies intervention points in autonomous workflows and proposes a lightweight protocol for uncertainty signaling in enterprise deployments.

item.title: Neuro-Symbolic Retrieval for Scientific QA
item.description: We present a hybrid retrieval pipeline combining dense vectors with symbolic constraints to reduce hallucinations in scientific question answering workflows.
